title: Finding a suitable date and time for group meetings with external parties using Monday

posts.author: Floris (Floris Geurts)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

We have to plan a lot of meetings with our customers and partners for every project. We spend a lot of time finding suitable dates and times for all involved parties. Is there a way to easily suggest dates and collect the availability of various external parties using Monday?
